zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey於大約1226年出生在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東時，他的父親William d'Aguillon63歲，母親Joan FitzHenry45歲。他於1256年8月30日之前與Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年2月15日在英國素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey于大约1226年出生在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東时，他的父亲William d'Aguillon63岁，母亲Joan FitzHenry45岁。他于1256年8月30日之前与Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1286年2月15日在英国素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aguillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Jesus, Pablo, Juan, Agustin, Carlos, Ernesto, Manuel, Roberto, Ruben, Santiago.
habitational name from any of several places called Aguillón in Spain (Asturias or Galicia), or Aguillon in Var, France.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey was born about 1226, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, his father, William d'Aguillon, was 63 and his mother, Joan FitzHenry, was 45. He married Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' before 30 August 1256. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 15 February 1286, in Addington, Surrey, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey est né environ 1226, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William d'Aguillon, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzHenry, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' avant 30 août 1256. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 février 1286, à Addington, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Addington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey um 1226 in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William d'Aguillon 63 und seine Mutter Joan FitzHenry 45. Er hat vor 30. August 1256 Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Februar 1286 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Addington, Surrey, England und wurde in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey è nato il circa 1226 nel Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, William d'Aguillon, aveva 63 anni e il suo madre, Joan FitzHenry, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' prima del 30 agosto 1256. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 15 febbraio 1286, nel Addington, Surrey, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Addington, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surreyが約1226年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンで生まれた時，父William d'Aguillonは63歳，母Joan FitzHenryは45歳であった。1256年8月30日以前にJoan de Ferrers 'the Elder'と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1286年2月15日にイギリススリーアッドイントンで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーアッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William d'Aguillon(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan FitzHenry(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1256년 8월 30일 이전 Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder'(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 2월 15일 영국 수리 애딩턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 애딩턴에 묻혔다.

mn.St Mary the Blessed Virgin Churchyard, A: Addington, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William d'Aguillon, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzHenry, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' antes 30 de agosto de 1256. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1286, em Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey родился около 1226 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William d'Aguillon было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzHenry, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' перед 30 августа 1256 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 15 февраля 1286 г. в местности аддингтон, сурри, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности аддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert d'Aguillon Sheriff of Surrey nació aproximadamente 1226, en Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William d'Aguillon, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Joan FitzHenry, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Joan de Ferrers 'the Elder' antes de 30 de agosto de 1256. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1286, en Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
